0.text: Atelectasis in lower lobes of both lungs contiguous with pleural effusions

1.text: Complete atelectasis of right lower lobe

2.text: Complete atelectasis of left lower lobe, except superior segment

3.text: Minimal peribronchial thickening in central regions of both lungs

4.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs

5.text: Indeterminate subcentimeter nodules in both lungs
